name: star23/baller13
akas: potentially baller423/goober2 or just ties between them
brief: Shortly after the model was removed, we encountered further instances of the same payload with varying IP addresses. One such instance remains active: star23/baller13. It’s worth noting the similarity in the model name to the deleted user, suggesting potential ties between them. Source
categories: LL  Models used for backdoor deployment
